title: NEU MASTER Electric Nail Gun/Staple Gun,Brad Nailer for Upholstery, Carpentry & Woodworking Projects, Staples 300pcs & Nails 100pcs Included,Uses 18G Nails and Type90 Staples
features: 🔰【WIDE APPLICATION 】The nailer/stapler is ideal for Softwood DIY projects such as carpentry, picture framing, door or window molding installation, pet house DIY, while NOT recommended for quarter round, baseboard, drywall installation, roofing or flooring.

🔰【Versatility & Practicality】Highly practical 2-in-1 electric nail gun & staple gun, capable of driving 18GA brad nails 15-32mm and Type90 18GA staples (5.7mm narrow crown) 15-25mm, ideal for fastening/fixing boards to suit the upholstery work at hand

🔰【Safety & Reliability】The brad nailer is designed with an On/Off power switch, safety contacts and an easily squeezed trigger to ensure safe use and avoid accidental triggering【PS: Please turn on the power button, then safety contact feature requires contact with working surface fully before firing to prevent misuse】

🔰【Humanity Design】Electric brad nailer power adjustment dial according to material thickness or nails/staples length to get the perfect finish, for Light-duty projects. Overmolded soft grip promotes comfortable use and reduces hand fatigue.Unique British VDE(3 pin) plug for easier use

🛒【What You Get!】Includes 1 x nails guns electric, 300pcs x 19mm staples , 100pcs x 25mm18G bard nails , 1 x Hexagon key , 1 x instruction manual. If you encounter any issues with our machine, please don't hesitate to contact us.📧[spartartool@outlook.com]
📢【Tips 】Operating with both hands and applying pressure on the top of the electric stapler, which will be better to get the nail completely into the wood.
description: Product Description How to use the brad nailer Step By Step Step 1 - Turn on the On/Off switch Step 2 - Press the contact safety firmly Step 3- Squeeze the trigger to active the brad nailer Previous page Next page How to better use the PLD6043 electric nailer/stapler ? 1. The two-handed operation can enhance the nailing force. 2.Use the proper gauge nails and the proper length staples in the tool. (Pls refer to the details page) 3.Use on softer woods for best results. How to Remove the stuck nail/staple? If you can pull the slider directly --- use pliers to remove it directly. If not---Press the slider at first, then widen the gap of the nail/staple outlet with a tool and remove it with pliers. Note that in general,accidental jamming issues are normal. Please confirm that you have correctly load the nails/staples. Then, fully press the contact safety button and pull the trigger to activate the electric nail gun. ***Please do not hesitate to reach out to us if you have any issues. What are the recommended projects for electric nail guns? 1）Suitable for Softwood DIY projects, such as carpentry, picture framing, door or window molding installation, pet house DIY. 2）NOT recommended for quarter round, baseboard, drywall installation, roofing or flooring. Any suggestions to make me better use this electric staple gun? 1) The two-handed operation will boosts driving power & stability. 2) Use the proper gauge nails and the proper length staples in the tool. ***Please feel free tp reach out to NEU MASTER Service Team if you encounter any issues.
